_note: Request bodies the three closeout mutations accept. These mirror api.ts (sendInvoiceEmail / createInvoicePayment / reverseInvoicePayment). No fields beyond what the frozen backend already exposes are invented.

request.message: Estimados, adjuntamos su factura electrónica autorizada. Quedamos atentos.

send_email._note_response: On success the parent refreshes via GET invoice detail; the UI shows a sent timestamp from the action result / refreshed record. Delivery tracking, resend history and WhatsApp are explicitly out of scope.

create_payment._note: The UI collects a decimal amount ('1150.50') and converts to integer cents before sending. Quick-fill chips ('saldo total', '50%') compute from settlement.balanceDueInCents. Response is the created PaymentResponse; the parent refreshes the invoice so settlement updates.

request.reason: Cheque sin fondos — el abono no se concretó.

reverse_payment._note: Reversal is a secondary, clearly exceptional path. Response is the updated PaymentResponse (status 'reversed' + reversedAt + reversalReason); the parent refreshes so settlement recomputes balance.
